title: Add Radius Around Locations in Map View
excerpt: Show a radius on map to communicate targeting radius around locations. For example, 20km/12 miles around each location. Shows as circle radius on map to visualise any overlap and the reach.

posts.author: sian (Sian Wilkins)
posts.cookedHtml: Show a radius on map to communicate targeting radius around locations. For example, 20km/12 miles around each location. Shows as circle radius on map to visualise any overlap and the reach.
